items.title: From 'dear Donald' to 'Trump trillion': Inside NATO chief Mark Rutte's U.S. strategy
items.description: NATO chief Mark Rutte lavished praise on U.S. President Donald Trump during a fractious summit in Turkey this week.

items.title: Alleged Reflecting Pool vandal David Hearn pleads not guilty; lawyer calls him 'scapegoat'
items.description: "If Mr. Hearn can be charged with a felony for touching the Reflecting Pool, every American is at risk," a lawyer said as he blasted the Trump administration.

items.title: Jim Cramer: 'Costco's in a funk' but still a good name in a bad neighborhood
items.description: Costco's moderating June comps growth reinforce that the stock's premium valuation leaves little room for disappointment.

items.title: Palo Alto CEO Arora says AI pricing needs to fall 90% as token costs skyrocket
items.description: Palo Alto Networks CEO Nikesh Arora said high token costs could prevent businesses from adopting artificial intelligence at scale.

items.title: Anthropic appoints former Fed Chair Ben Bernanke to its independent trust
items.description: Members of the trust advise Anthropic leadership and do not hold any equity in the company.

items.title: Tanker traffic through Strait of Hormuz slows after Iranian attacks trigger renewed fighting with U.S.
items.description: Oil has rallied more than 7% this week as investors worry that exports through Hormuz could plunge as the U.S. and Iran fight for control of the strait.

items.title: Trump can halt trade with Spain using law behind scrapped tariffs: Greer
items.description: Trump asserted that IEEPA authorized him to slap tariffs on nearly every country, but the Supreme Court struck down those import duties.

items.title: Trump claims to be 'number one' on TikTok. What does that mean?
items.description: Trump is the most followed world leader on the app, with nearly 17 million followers.

items.title: Oil prices fall as market bets U.S.-Iran fighting won't escalate into wider war
items.description: Oil prices turned lower on Thursday after the U.S. carried out fresh strikes on Iran, renewing concerns about supply disruptions in the Middle East.

items.title: These 10 states are best positioned to land AI data center deals despite rising public opposition
items.description: These ten U.S. states have the best infrastructure to win future AI data center deals despite rising public opposition.

items.title: Here's how Trump Account assets may affect your college aid eligibility
items.description: Assets in a Trump Account may affect a student's need-based college aid eligibility, based on how income is reported on the FAFSA.

items.title: How all 50 U.S. states performed over 20 years of Top States for Business
items.description: Across 20 years of CNBC's America's Top States for Business rankings, some states have proven to be consistent winners, and others to be perennial dogs.

items.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
items.description: Competition in the multitrillion-dollar market for retirement assets is fierce among managers such as Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, Russell Investments and Mercer.

items.title: June home sales disappoint as prices reach an all-time high
items.description: Home sales dropped in June month over month as mortgage rates remain stubbornly high. Prices hit an all-time high.

items.title: Platner quits Maine Senate race; Democrats set to pick new nominee
items.description: Maine Democrats must now replace Platner with less than four months until the midterm elections.

items.title: World Cup drives Google Search to record queries per second
items.description: The milestone comes amid Lionel Messi and Argentina's popularity.

items.title: PepsiCo earnings miss estimates as U.S. consumers tighten their budgets
items.description: PepsiCo reported weaker-than-expected quarterly earnings despite strong international demand.

items.title: Meta jumps into AI coding market in effort to chase Anthropic and OpenAI
items.description: Meta is upgrading its Muse Spark artificial intelligence model under the leadership of AI chief Alexandr Wang.

items.title: AstraZeneca stock drops 9% after heart drug trial miss deals rare blow to pharma powerhouse
items.description: A late-stage clinical trial failed to miss its primary endpoint, U.K.'s laregst drugmaker said Thursday.

items.title: Arkansas is America's Most Improved State in 2026 as workers move to Walmart's home for low costs, high quality of life
items.description: Arkansas is the Most Improved State for Business in CNBC's annual Top States rankings, as working-age adults are attracted by low costs and quality of life.
